build.beforeDevCommand: npm --workspace=@atomyx/sidecar run build:bundle && mkdir -p src-tauri/resources && cp ../../packages/sidecar/dist-bundle/sidecar.cjs src-tauri/resources/sidecar.cjs && cp ../../packages/sidecar/dist-bundle/sidecar.cjs src-tauri/target/debug/sidecar.cjs 2>/dev/null; npm run dev
build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run build && npm --workspace=@atomyx/sidecar run build:bundle && mkdir -p src-tauri/resources && cp ../../packages/sidecar/dist-bundle/sidecar.cjs src-tauri/resources/sidecar.cjs

bundle.longDescription: Desktop IDE for authoring, validating, and running Atomyx YAML test scripts on real mobile devices.
